rationale: The skill invokes the `firecrawl` CLI (or via `npx`) to scrape arbitrary user-supplied URLs, so it will make outbound network connections to api.firecrawl.dev (the Firecrawl API) and indirectly to any target domain the user provides. Output is written to the local `.firecrawl/` directory and may later be read back via `grep`/`head` or direct file reads. No deletions are implied by the documented commands.
